title: Jump-Flung Fumble
description: Carrier jumps and is hit or loses control during vertical motion. Verticality must produce readable chaos with a contestable ball — not a dead straight-down drop.

expected_outcomes.description: Ball travels in a direction related to the collision — readable momentum transfer.
Ball comes to rest or bounces in a location where players can realistically contest it.

must_not_outcomes.description: Ball falls directly below the carrier with no spatial influence from the hit.

notes: Jump + hit interaction is a primary EFT skill expression. The output direction should be predictable enough for experienced players to anticipate.
